case_title: OLEG UCHITEL RESPONDENT VS. WILLIAM R. NELSON et al APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UCHITEL, OLEG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, WILLIAM R. VERLAZQUEZ, ARTURO PENNZOIL 10 MINTURE OIL CHANGE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,042.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER BELDON YEE. MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2002 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL ON JUL-18-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 501.
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT NELSON, WILLIAM R. VERLAZQUEZ, ARTURO PENNZOIL 10 MINTURE OIL CHANGE AS TO RESPONDENT UCHITEL, OLEG HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2002 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM
JUDGE: DAVID A. GARCIA. CLERK: JOSIE C. ROQUE. TRIAL DE NOVO HELD ON JUL-18-02. COURT FINDS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS FOR $1000.00 AND $42.00 COSTS.(501)

JUDGE: DAVID A. GARCIA. CLERK: JOSIE C. ROQUE. REPORTER: NOT PRESENT. CAUSE ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 501 FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. ARGUED. COURT TRIAL ON JUL-18-2002 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JULY 18, 2002 BY JUDGE DAVID A. GARCIA.(501)
